hooks.command: bash -c "grep -rn 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY\|AIX_SUPABASE_KEY' --include='*.py' *.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'os.environ\|os.getenv\|os.env' | head -5 && echo 'BLOCKED: hardcoded key found' && exit 1 || exit 0"
hooks.description: Block hardcoded secrets in Python files

hooks.command: bash -c "echo 'Task completed — HANDOFF.md 업데이트와 Linear 상태 변경을 잊지 마세요'"
